public_recrawl_live_dry_run_plan_v2.scope: Public recrawl planning only; fixture validation precedes any live crawl.
public_recrawl_live_dry_run_plan_v2.artifact_policy: Do not commit raw crawl output, downloaded documents, browser traces, or newly captured live pages.

attended_devhub_read_only_live_dry_run_p.read_only_boundary: Human-attended observation only; no authentication state or browser artifacts may be persisted.
attended_devhub_read_only_live_dry_run_p.human_attendance: A human operator must be present for any DevHub read-only observation.

live_readiness_authorization_checklist_p.authorization_gate: No live execution is authorized by this fixture packet.
stop_conditions: official submission, certification, cancellation, or upload path
request to persist auth state, traces, downloads, screenshots, or raw crawl output

go_no_go_briefing_notes.note: Proceed only with deterministic fixture validation and cited briefing review; do not begin live crawling or authenticated browser automation.
Any step that would mutate release state, create auth artifacts, submit official actions, or persist browser traces is outside this packet.

required_human_attendance_checkpoints.required_attendee: task supervisor or delegated PP&D operator
required_human_attendance_checkpoints.purpose: Confirm fixture inputs, cited source packet versions, and no-live-execution boundaries before validation.

required_human_attendance_checkpoints.required_attendee: human operator physically present at the browser session
required_human_attendance_checkpoints.purpose: Observe only; do not authenticate, submit, upload, certify, cancel, or persist browser artifacts.

required_human_attendance_checkpoints.required_attendee: task supervisor or delegated PP&D reviewer
required_human_attendance_checkpoints.purpose: Review redacted briefing artifacts and confirm no private session state or raw crawl output was created.

independent_stop_conditions: Any prompt for CAPTCHA, MFA, payment, account creation, submission, certification, cancellation, or upload.
Any request to store cookies, tokens, auth state, session files, traces, screenshots, downloads, or raw crawl output.
Any mismatch between fixture packet versions and the cited briefing notes.
Any command or operator instruction that would mutate release state or perform an official action.
artifact_redaction_expectations: Briefing artifacts must contain citations and derived notes only, not raw DevHub pages or downloaded documents.
Private identifiers, cookies, tokens, credentials, browser profiles, screenshots, traces, and session storage must be absent.
Public recrawl examples must be fixture excerpts or stable public references, not newly captured live output.
